hooks.prompt: Check if the project directory contains an .ido4shape/sources/ folder with any files newer than the latest session summary. If new materials are found, note them for discussion.

If the file being written matches *-spec.md and the project has an .ido4shape/ workspace where the Understanding Assessment shows any dimension as thin or not started, this write should be blocked. Spec composition requires sufficient understanding depth.
If an .ido4shape/canvas.md exists in the project, note the current Understanding Assessment dimensions and confidence levels as context for this response.
If .ido4shape/ exists, save any current conversation insights to canvas.md before context is compacted.
If .ido4shape/ exists and specification work happened, ensure canvas.md is updated and a session summary exists in the sessions directory.
